summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NT Commerce new features: Tax Reports, Currencies, WhatsApp Business, Notifications, and Date formatting. All backend APIs passed (16/16 tests). Frontend pages load correctly with proper functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Date formatting is correctly using YYYY-MM-DD format with Western numerals across SaaS Admin page
Tax Reports page has 4 tabs (report, rates, declarations, annual) - all working
Currency converter dialog shows conversion result correctly (1000 DZD = 7.41 USD)
WhatsApp Business page shows config settings, stats cards (4 cards), and supported commands
All 10 currencies are displayed correctly in the currencies table
Sidebar has new sections: 'المالية والضرائب' (Finance & Taxes) and 'التكاملات' (Integrations)
seed_data_creation: Used existing tenant and super admin accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested: Tax Reports (/tax-reports), WhatsApp (/whatsapp), Currencies (/currencies). Login endpoint is /api/auth/unified-login. Token field is 'access_token'. Date format is YYYY-MM-DD with Western numerals globally applied via globalDateFormatter.js. WhatsApp Business API is MOCKED - messages are logged to DB but not actually sent via WhatsApp.

date_formatting.saas_admin_dates: PASS - Dates show as YYYY-MM-DD with Western numerals (e.g., 2026-03-20)
date_formatting.date_format_config: PASS - globalDateFormatter.js uses 'yyyy-MM-dd' format by default

tax_reports_page.tabs_present: PASS - 4 tabs: التقرير الضريبي, معدلات الضرائب, التصريحات, الملخص السنوي
tax_reports_page.report_generation: PASS - Generate button creates tax report showing VAT, income tax, TAP
tax_reports_page.tax_rates_displayed: PASS - 5 default rates (VAT Standard, VAT Reduced, Income Tax, Withholding, TAP)
tax_reports_page.tax_summary_cards: PASS - Shows total sales (113,803 دج), purchases (0 دج), expenses (8,893 دج)

whatsapp_page.config_dialog: PASS - Opens with Phone Number ID, Access Token, Verify Token fields
whatsapp_page.stats_cards: PASS - 4 cards: الحالة (status), الرسائل الواردة, الرسائل الصادرة, إجمالي الرسائل
whatsapp_page.commands_section: PASS - Shows 5 supported commands: مصروف, فاتورة, رصيد, تقرير, مبيعات

currencies_page.currencies_table: PASS - 10 currencies displayed (DZD, USD, EUR, GBP, SAR, AED, TRY, MAD, TND, CNY)
currencies_page.exchange_rates: PASS - Rates shown (USD=135 دج, EUR=148 دج, GBP=172 دج)
currencies_page.converter_dialog: PASS - Currency converter works (1000 DZD = 7.41 USD)
currencies_page.quick_converter_cards: PASS - 3 cards at bottom for USD, EUR, SAR

sidebar_sections.finance_taxes_section: PASS - 'المالية والضرائب' section present with tax-reports and currencies links
sidebar_sections.integrations_section: PASS - 'التكاملات' section present with whatsapp link

backend_apis.GET_tax_report: PASS - Generates report with VAT, income tax, TAP calculations
backend_apis.GET_tax_summary: PASS - Returns annual summary with quarterly breakdown
backend_apis.GET_currencies: PASS - Returns 10 currencies with exchange rates
backend_apis.GET_whatsapp_config: PASS - Returns tenant config with verify_token

mocked_apis.WhatsApp_Business_API: MOCKED - Messages queued in DB but not sent externally via Meta API
